creator: ds@ukrhub.net
text:
Russian translation of articles/hubs got outdated.

Fix: 

Patches available at http://chaos.ukrhub.net/FDP/hubs/doc.ru.articles.hubs.diff.tbz might help correct the translation.
How-To-Repeat:   Just compare the last revision of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/hubs/article.sgml and 'Original revision' of http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/doc/ru_RU.KOI8-R/articles/hubs/article.sgml?rev=1.13;content-type=text%2Fplain
